headline: What if rooms auto-published crates when artifact thresholds were met?
body: When extraction hits a quality threshold, the room compiles artifacts into a versioned crate, writes the manifest, and publishes to PyPI or crates.io automatically. The room becomes both warehouse and factory. No human hand on the wheel.
fleet_relevance: We have tile-refiner and six Python crates. The pipeline is one automation layer away from self-publishing.
actionable: Prototype a room watcher that triggers on artifact count
Generate a pyproject.toml from extracted tile schemas
